title: Renewable Breeze Rods
description: Renewable wind charges through breezes dropping breeze rods upon being hit instead of only on death.
body: This datapack adds a feature that makes it so when a breeze takes damage, it has a 50% change of dropping a breeze rod. This makes it so breeze rods are renewable wherever and whenever, without having to be at a trial chamber or wait for the 30-minute trial spawner cooldown.
